acceptanceCriteria.description: Foundation Proven requires preserved Behaviour, Substrate, and Resilience Proven evidence.
Foundation Proven requires complete journey evidence spanning tenancy, security, observability, operational recovery, governance, ownership, lifecycle, and production-shaped service posture.
Production identity must use real provider posture; mock-only or temporary mock override evidence cannot certify L6.
L6 requires observed audit records, metrics, traces, and logs for production-shaped journeys.
L6 requires backup, restore, failover, recovery, rollback/readiness gates, and no silent data loss.

hardRejectionRules: proof-emitted telemetry without required observed telemetry

capabilities.capability: Custom domains, DNS ownership, TLS, canonical
PITR, retention, legal hold, data residency
Data governance: catalog, lineage, classification, PII, DSR/GDPR
Object storage + tenant prefixes + signed URLs
Event bus, durable queues, DLQ, redrive
Scheduled jobs (built-in, on the event substrate)
Compliance reports, access reviews, evidence packs
API docs, developer portal, SDKs, rate limits
Tenant lifecycle: provision, suspend, delete, export
Browser telemetry (Grafana Faro RUM + browser-to-BFF tracing)
